title: Now you can copy email templates between boards
excerpt:

posts.author: SariHoltz (Sari Holtz)
posts.cookedHtml:
If you’re working across multiple monday.com boards, rebuilding the same email over and over gets old fast (IYKYK).

There’s now a simple way to duplicate SuperMail email templates from one board to another, so you can build once and reuse them wherever you need. Templates carry over with images, attachments, status changes, links, and more — no rework required.

Setup takes less than 2 minutes, and you’ll save HOURS of time.

This exciting upgrade is thanks to your feedback - please keep it coming!
